title: Utils Module Tests

tasks.description: Create entityUtils tests - Test findEntityByName (exact match, missing, case-sensitive), filterEntities (by type, tags, importance, combined filters), and sortEntities (by name, date, importance)
testCategories: findEntityByName (exact match, undefined for missing, case-sensitive)
filterEntities (by type, by tags, by importance, combined filters)
sortEntities (by name, by date, by importance)

tasks.description: Create tagUtils tests - Test normalizeTag (lowercase, trim whitespace, special characters), hasMatchingTag (exact match, normalized match, empty tags), and mergeTags (combine arrays, deduplicate, normalize result)
testCategories: hasMatchingTag (exact match, normalized match, empty tags)

tasks.description: Create validationHelper tests - Test validateWithSchema (valid input, invalid input, detailed errors) and schema validation (entity schema, relation schema, search query schema)
testCategories: validateWithSchema (valid input, invalid input, detailed errors)
Schema Validation (entity schema, relation schema, search query schema)

tasks.description: Create validationUtils tests - Test validateEntity (valid entity, missing name, invalid importance, invalid tags), validateRelation (valid relation, missing from/to, missing type), validateImportance (0-10, negative, >10, non-integer), and validateTags (valid tags, empty tags, non-string tags)
testCategories: validateEntity (valid, missing name, invalid importance, invalid tags)
validateImportance (0-10 accepted, negative rejected, >10 rejected, non-integer rejected)
validateTags (valid tags, empty tags rejected, non-string rejected)

successCriteria: Utils module coverage increases from 47% to 90%
notes: Utils module provides foundational functions used across the codebase. Testing these ensures consistent behavior for entity filtering, tag normalization, and input validation. These are mostly pure functions making them easy to test.
